concerns.analysis: Multiple pages and sections are missing from the output. Pages 4 through 18 are replaced by an omission marker ('21 sections omitted for token budget'). Furthermore, pages 21 through 26 are entirely absent without any marker. Specifically, the content for 'Creating COVIDSafeNC' (pages 21-22), 'NCDIT Goes Virtual with Webinar Series' (page 23), 'Awards and Recognition' (pages 24-25), and the beginning of 'Looking Ahead' (page 26) are missing. Additionally, several meaningful photographs are missing, including the photo of Governor Roy Cooper on page 21 and various staff/contextual photos on pages 4, 8, 10, 19, and 20.
